fact: fixed-heartbeat-30m runs every 30 minutes targeting main session
nightly-memory-extraction runs at 23:00 ICT for memory extraction
platform-health-council runs at 03:00 ICT for daily system audit
nightly-security-review runs at 03:30 ICT for security analysis
self-improvement runs at 04:00 ICT for core files review
Fixed heartbeat cron is currently disabled after causing noisy Telegram delivery during active market-intel development.
Daily signal review cron was added at 22:00 ICT to post pending evaluations and accuracy stats for market signal accountability.
trading-daily-report cron was switched to minimax/MiniMax-M2.5 model to reduce Codex quota usage.

Major cost control: 14 cron jobs moved from Bailian to minimax with lightContext=true (auto-signal-dispatcher, rss-feed-monitor, reddit-monitor, market-signal-generator, weekend-light variants, data-manager, entity-lifecycle-manager, weekly-test-suite, dependency-update-audit, enrichment-ab-review, signal-accuracy-review, skill-level-check).
Weekend light-mode added: rss-feed-monitor-weekend-light and reddit-monitor-weekend-light added for lighter weekend scanning.
autonomous-queue-wakeup schedule changed from hourly to 3x daily (10:15, 14:15, 18:15 ICT).
New cron job added: workspace-home-improvement runs daily at 07:30 ICT for bounded low-risk workspace maintenance, with Morning Meeting disclosure requirement.
Autonomy gate implemented: scripts/autonomy_gate.py with three modes (workspace, queue, improve) provides deterministic preflight checks for autonomous execution.

Session log cleanup cron added: daily 05:20 ICT via deterministic scheduler, purges raw session files older than 5 days from /data/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions. First run deleted 71 files (48MB), reduced session storage from 89M to 43M.

Legacy cron cleanup: 13 obsolete disabled OpenClaw wrapper jobs removed (data-manager, entity-lifecycle-manager, pre-market-brief, reddit-monitor, weekly-test-suite, rss-feed-monitor-weekend-light, auto-signal-dispatcher, reddit-monitor-weekend-light, dependency-update-audit, audit-sensitive-snapshot, rss-feed-monitor, enrichment-ab-review, trading-daily-report). deterministic-scheduler-watchdog retained as safety net.

Deterministic scheduler architecture clarified: host-side script execution via scripts/deterministic_scheduler.py for runner jobs, OpenClaw cron reserved for model-backed analysis/review jobs (nightly-memory-extraction, platform-health-council, nightly-security-review, self-improvement, daily-task-generator, signal-accuracy-review, market-signal-generator).

nightly-memory-extraction failed on Apr 7 because its model prompt/save path still leaked ~/.openclaw/workspace/ instead of the required /data/.openclaw/workspace/ absolute paths. Functional status is degraded until the prompt is corrected.
